summary: The customer's internet integration issue was not resolved after multiple calls, and the agent failed to escalate the issue properly. The customer was frustrated with the lack of a solution and the potential cost of a technician visit.
issue: The agent failed to escalate the issue to a senior agent or supervisor after the customer mentioned they had called multiple times about the same issue.
resolution: The agent should have escalated the issue to a senior agent or supervisor after the customer mentioned they had called multiple times about the same issue.

satisfaction.frustration_reason: Lack of resolution and potential cost

model_metrics.notes: Agent failed to follow escalation policy

violations.quote: I have called twice already and nothing has been fixed.
violations.explanation: The agent failed to escalate the issue to a senior agent or supervisor after the customer mentioned they had called multiple times about the same issue.

violations.quote: I will raise a ticket. Someone will respond in forty eight hours.
violations.explanation: The agent did not offer to escalate the issue to a manager or supervisor when the customer expressed frustration with the lack of a solution.

improvements.suggestion: The agent should have escalated the issue to a senior agent or supervisor after the customer mentioned they had called multiple times about the same issue.
improvements.example: I'm going to escalate this issue to my supervisor to ensure it gets the attention it needs.

improvements.suggestion: The agent should have acknowledged the customer's frustration and offered a more timely solution.
improvements.example: I understand how frustrating this must be for you, and I'm going to do my best to get this resolved as quickly as possible.

highlights: The agent did attempt to offer a solution by suggesting the customer restart their internet connection.

compliance_alerts.message: [HIGH] Repeat Contact Escalation — The agent failed to escalate the issue to a senior agent or supervisor after the customer mentioned
compliance_alerts.quote: I have called twice already and nothing has been fixed.

compliance_alerts.message: [HIGH] Escalation Policy — The agent did not offer to escalate the issue to a manager or supervisor when the customer expressed
compliance_alerts.quote: I will raise a ticket. Someone will respond in forty eight hours.

transcript_snippet:
Agent: Agent
Agent: says tech support. What is the issue? Customer says,
Agent: my Internet integration has been failing every few hours for two weeks.
Agent: I work from home and it is seriously affecting my job.
Agent: Agent
Agent: says, have you tried restarting?
Agent: Customer says, yes.
Agent: Many times.
Agent: I have called twice already and nothing has been fixed.
Agent: Agent says, try restarting again.
Agent: Customer says,
Agent: I just told you I have restarted many times.
Agent: I
